Notice Of Motion And Motin To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatores
Off Calendar May-03-2022 Continued To May-10-22 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Erik Reinertson, Esq. (415.533.3639; ereinertson@tbsglaw.com) of Law Offices of Thomas M. Bruen for Plaintiffs.
Walter Lin, Esq. (415.931.4207) of Law Offices of Michael Heath for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. Mr. Reinertson stated parties have reached an agreement and requested a continuance for a written settlement agreement to be signed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS LARRY FRIAS and SUSAN FRIAS' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories is continued to May 10, 2022 at 1:30pm, Discovery with the court's expectation the hearing date on these motions will not be necessary. Parties to email sbs@sbslawsf.com and discovery302@sftc.org to request the motion be taken off calendar when settled is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steve Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
